description: Houthi attacks on commercial vessels caused major rerouting via Cape of Good Hope.

mitigation_taken.action: Emergency airfreight for semiconductors + expedited partial order from spot market
mitigation_taken.outcome: Partial — BMW SLA maintained, VW delayed 4 days

lessons_learned: Pre-position 45-day buffer for SEMI-MCU-32 before Q4. Airfreight contract needed.

timeline.text: Port congestion signal detected via AIS data; Houthi attacks on commercial vessels caused major rerouting via Cape of Good Hope.
Agent mapped affected supplier routes (SUP-001, SUP-003).
Mitigation: Emergency airfreight for semiconductors + expedited partial order from spot market.
Pre-position 45-day buffer for SEMI-MCU-32 before Q4. Airfreight contract needed.

description: PlastiMold Vietnam reported cash flow issues; delayed 2 shipments without notice.

mitigation_taken.action: Emergency order from secondary supplier MoldTech Thailand

lessons_learned: Qualify backup supplier in Thailand. Monitor SUP-003 health score monthly.

timeline.text: PlastiMold Vietnam reported cash flow issues; delayed 2 shipments without notice.
Agent compared with production schedule and buffer stock.
Mitigation: Emergency order from secondary supplier MoldTech Thailand.
Qualify backup supplier in Thailand. Monitor SUP-003 health score monthly.

description: Heightened military tensions led to export uncertainty for Taiwan semiconductors.

mitigation_taken.action: Pre-emptive buffer build — 60-day stock of SEMI-MCU-32 acquired
mitigation_taken.outcome: Success — no disruption materialized but buffer provided insurance

lessons_learned: Taiwan geopolitical signals should trigger immediate buffer build given single-source dependency.

timeline.text: Heightened military tensions led to export uncertainty for Taiwan semiconductors.
Cross-referenced supplier dependencies — single-source SUP-001 at risk.
Mitigation: Pre-emptive buffer build — 60-day stock of SEMI-MCU-32 acquired.
Taiwan geopolitical signals should trigger immediate buffer build given single-source dependency.

description: Suez Canal shipping lane disruption (+16 day delay) combined with low inventory (12 days) for critical single-source component SEMI-MCU-32 from SemiTech Asia in Taiwan.

mitigation_taken.action: Emergency Airfreight for 1,600 units SEMI-MCU-32. Alternative supplier qualification initiated.

lessons_learned: To be determined based on outcome.

timeline.text: Suez Canal shipping lane disruption detected. +16 day delay; low inventory (12 days) for SEMI-MCU-32 from SemiTech Asia.
Agent mapped affected supplier routes and inventory runway.
Mitigation: Emergency Airfreight for 1,600 units SEMI-MCU-32. Alternative supplier qualification initiated.
Lessons learned to be determined based on outcome.

description: Suez Canal blockage — 16-day average delay. Alternative mitigation scenario: full 6,400 unit airfreight to cover extended runway.

mitigation_taken.action: Recommended Emergency Airfreight for 6,400 units (higher cost, full coverage).

lessons_learned: To be determined based on outcome.

timeline.text: Suez Canal blockage — 16-day average delay. Alternative mitigation scenario: full 6,400 unit airfreight to cover extended runway.
Agent evaluated full airfreight vs partial; revenue protection outweighs cost.
Mitigation: Recommended Emergency Airfreight for 6,400 units (higher cost, full coverage).
